title: ferray-stats: mean requires Float — can't compute mean of integer arrays
description:
Steps to reproduce:
1. 

Expected: 
Actual: 

mean() requires T: Element + Float, which excludes integer types. NumPy's np.mean(int_arr) works by promoting the accumulator to float64. ferray-stats users can't compute the mean of an integer array at all — it's a compile error. At minimum, add a separate mean_as_f64() function, or use a generic accumulator type that allows integer-to-float promotion.
